text:
SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: There can be multiple records per CCW_APR_LINK_KEY. 

On records where the value of this field equals 1, the address components always reflect those of the 
service location address. If no service location exists for the provider, the address from the practice 
location is used. Where no service or practice locations exist, the billing location is used. 

When the provider location ID (variable called PRVDR_LCTN_ID)
